quality.rationale: 结合刘维尔定理与相空间不变性推导红移下的黑体辐射流量，逻辑链条完整，具有明确的观测天体物理背景且结论不依赖红移具体成因

origin.question: Problem 19.3. An object emits black body radiation of temperature $T$ in its own rest frame; we see it at a redshift $z$ and subtending a solid angle $\Omega$ . What flux do we measure? What if the redshift is due to doppler motion of a local object instead of a cosmological redshift?
